title: BBL Utility
description: Various useful items and blocks including block breakers and placers. fluid placers and collectors and resource generators
body:
# __**BBL Utility**__

## __**Overview**__

Requires [BBL Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbl-core)

BBL Utility adds various new blocks and items to minecraft to help in various ways from block breakers to sapling growers utility aim to provide a base of useful things for your modded adventure 

## __**Items**__

*   Crook - Increases drops of leaf blocks
*   Sapling Grower - Instantly grows saplings and anything inside the "utility:valid\_for\_sapling\_grower" block tag
*   Animal Net - Right click to pick up mobs. Config can be used to set what mob type its allowed to capture
*   Death Stone - Given to the player on Death, when used returns player to death point, Can be disabled
*   Floater - When held in off hand allows any block in the main hand to be placed in the air or water
*   Mini Coal/Charcoal - Smelts a single item
*   Wooden Shears - Shears but wooden
*   Leafy String - String made from Leaves
*   Soaked Paper - Dried into Paper
*   Log Sheet - Soaked into Soaked Paper
*   Ender Pearl Fragment - Drops from Ender Ore, crafts into Ender Pearls

## __**Blocks**__

*   Ender Ore - Spawns under ground either Deepslate or Stone version
*   Drying Table - Dries items, can be waterlogged to soak instead. Recipe driven
*   Block Placer - Places blocks
*   Block Breaker - Breaks blocks, when using tools its enchantments are used as well, can be filtered
*   Resource Generator - Generates Cobblestone, Stone ect using fluids. Recipe driven
*   Fluid Placer - Placer fluids
*   Fluid Collector - Collects fluids
*   Item Repairer - Repairs items, time taken depends on the amount of damage
*   Fluid Generator - Generates fluids passively, Recipe driven
*   Redstone Clock - A highly configurable block that emits redstone, time, pulse duration and pulse strengh can all be set
*   Item Collector - Collects items in the world has configurable range and positioning 

## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
